# QA Plan: Sprint 23 — Platform Phase B I/O + Doctrine Polish + Full-Solution Gate
**Date**: 2026-07-08
**Generated by**: /qa-plan
**Scope**: 7 stories across Platform Editor (Req 21), Database Intelligence (Req 06), Doctrine (Req 13)
**Engine**: Unity 6.3 LTS (C# / .NET 8 headless for Data/CLI, PlayMode for Unity adapter) — .claude/docs/technical-preferences.md not fully configured
**Sprint File**: production/sprints/sprint-23-platform-phase-b-doctrine-polish.md (kickoff with detailed ACs, risks, Quality Gates, DoD); production/sprint-status.yaml (`sprint23_stories` section); docs/superpowers/plans/sprint-23-implementation.md
**Trunk**: `main` @ `7253381`
**Sprint Dates**: 2026-07-08 → 2026-07-22
**Sprint Goal**: Close Sprint 22 deferred quality gates by wiring ClosedXML binary `.xlsx` round-trip I/O (Req 21), establishing a green full-solution `ProjectAegis.sln` test baseline, and delivering Unity Editor visual sign-off for the Doctrine Inheritance Panel (Req 13) toward MVP polish.

---

| S23-02 Full-solution test gate baseline (23-2) | Integration (CI/Config) | Yes — `dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln` 0 errors; `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln` 0 failures; count recorded in evidence doc | Evidence review: `production/qa/smoke-sprint-23-*.md` with indexed commit + pass count; triage notes if failures fixed |
| S23-03 Unity Doctrine Inheritance Panel Editor visual sign-off (23-3) | UI (panel bind) + Integration (dispatch) + Visual (Editor layout) | Yes — `PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests` doctrine row PASS; headless `SetDoctrineOverride` round-trip regression (`DoctrineOverrideCommandTests`, `DoctrineInheritanceProjectionTests`, `DoctrineInheritancePanelBinderTests`); ZERO touch `DelegationBridge` grep/impact | **Mandatory** Editor manual evidence: screenshot/video at `production/qa/sprint-23-doctrine-editor-signoff-*.md`; WRA/ROE/EMCON visible and bound; inheritance chain explainable |

| S23-05 Phase B schema foundation spike — export-only (23-5) | Config/Data + Integration (migration + exporter) | Yes — migration applies cleanly; types compile; exporter emits Signatures/Mobility/EMCON sheet headers (empty rows OK); `Platform` filter green | Manual: verify workbook sheets exist with correct headers; tracker row 21 updated; confirm import deferred (no false import tests) |
| S23-06 CanonicalId determinism on Catalog* types (23-6) | Logic | Yes — determinism test PASS; golden hash pinned (DBI-7.3 stable `OrderBy` composite keys on mount/loadout/magazine/comms/platform/weapon) | None (automated golden sufficient) |

## Automated Tests Required

### S23-01 ClosedXML `.xlsx` adapter wiring + integration tests — Integration (primary; Logic secondary)

**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Platform/ClosedXmlPlatformWorkbookIoTests.cs` (new); extend `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Platform/PlatformWorkbookRoundTripTests.cs`; `src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/` for CLI verb integration

**What to test** (from kickoff AC + GDD 21 PLE-2.1 + ADR-011):
- `ClosedXmlPlatformWorkbookIo` round-trip empty-diff golden: export snapshot → import unedited binary `.xlsx` → zero staged changes (PLE-2.1; ADR-011 Compliance / Verification).
- CLI `platform_export_xlsx` produces real `.xlsx` (ZIP/OLE), not `CanonicalTextWorkbookIo` text format (closes Sprint 22 sign-off **C2**).
- CLI `platform_import_xlsx` on unedited export yields empty diff; `platform_diff_xlsx` consistent.
- Parity: same logical diff whether workbook I/O is `CanonicalTextWorkbookIo` or `ClosedXmlPlatformWorkbookIo` (kickoff AC).
- Text column format `@` prevents numeric coercion — existing adapter contract in `ClosedXmlPlatformWorkbookIo.cs` (e.g., `"57"` stays text).
- `Platform\|WriteGate` scoped tests remain green after wiring.
- GitNexus impact on `IPlatformWorkbookIo` checked before edit (HIGH per kickoff GitNexus Rules).
- From GDD 21: PLE-1.3 stable sort keys on export; PLE-2.2 stale snapshot reject unchanged; PLE-3.1 no auto-commit (write-gate path only).

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Empty workbook / minimal fixture snapshot
- Sheet name sanitization (`SafeSheetName` — invalid Excel chars)
- Large Baltic fixture round-trip (performance + correctness)
- Locale/invariant parsing — `InvariantCulture` on read (ADR-011 risk: locale drift)
- Invalid path / corrupt `.xlsx` → explainable error
- Fallback flag keeps `CanonicalTextWorkbookIo` for headless CI when ClosedXML restore fails (kickoff risk mitigation)

**Filters / commands**:
```powershell
dotnet restore src/ProjectAegis.Data.Excel/ProjectAegis.Data.Excel.csproj
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj --filter "Platform|ClosedXml|WriteGate" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests.csproj --filter "Mcp|Platform" -v minimal
dotnet run --project src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli -- platform_export_xlsx --snapshot <id> --output /tmp/test.xlsx
# verify: file /tmp/test.xlsx → Zip/OLE; NOT plain text
```

**Estimated test count**: ~8–12 (empty-diff golden binary, parity canonical vs closedxml, text coercion, sheet sanitize, CLI export/import/diff, stale snapshot, write-gate no-bypass)

*No formula found in referenced GDD Formulas section (doc 21 has no Formulas section) — test cases derived from PLE-* ACs and ADR-011 verification bullets.*

### S23-03 Unity Doctrine Inheritance Panel Editor visual sign-off — UI + Integration + Visual

**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/Bridge/PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests.cs` (extend doctrine row); `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.Tests/Projection/DoctrineInheritancePanelBinderTests.cs`; `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.Tests/Projection/DoctrineInheritanceProjectionTests.cs`; headless command tests in Delegation.Tests

**What to test** (from kickoff AC + GDD 13 AC1–6 + ADR-010):
- PlayMode smoke PASS — doctrine row + harness (`DoctrineInheritancePanelHost`)
- `SetDoctrineOverride` dispatch verified (headless command round-trip per ADR-010 — regression from S22-05)
- WRA/ROE/EMCON fields bind to `ResolvedUnitPolicy` projection
- Inheritance order explainable: unit > embarked > mission > group > side > scenario (GDD 13 Policy Inheritance Model)
- ZERO touch `DelegationBridge.cs` — grep + GitNexus impact upstream (CRITICAL, 77 upstream)
- GDD 13 AC6: headless identical policy denial sequence (regression guard)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Policy change during replay (logged `PolicyUpdate` per GDD 13 Open Q1)
- Inheritance with mission override only (GDD 13 AC1)
- Cautious agent + hold fire → `FireAbortReason.ROE_HOLD_FIRE` (GDD 13 AC2) — headless regression
- Panel with no overrides (inherits side default)

**Filters / commands**:
```powershell
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj --filter "Doctrine|PlayModeSmoke" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.Tests.csproj --filter "Doctrine" -v minimal
rg "DelegationBridge" unity/ProjectAegis/Assets/Scripts/Runtime/DoctrineInheritancePanelHost.cs
npx gitnexus impact DelegationBridge --direction upstream
# Unity Editor (local): Invoke-C2PlayModeSignoffBatch.ps1 or doctrine PlayMode harness
```

**Estimated test count**: ~3–5 new/extended PlayMode + regression on existing ~17 doctrine-scoped tests from S22

*Closes Sprint 22 sign-off **C4** (Editor visual deferred in S22; headless proxy was sufficient for S22 closeout only).*

---

### S23-04 ApproveBatch multi-entity commit path — Integration (primary; Logic for orphan guard)

**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/WriteGate/CatalogWriteGateTests.cs` (extend); `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Import/CmoMarkdownImporterTests.cs` (platform E2E)

**What to test** (from kickoff AC + GDD 06 DBI-1.4 + GDD 21 PLE-3.1):
- `ProposePlatformBatch` → `ApproveBatch` commits platform/weapon rows to live tables (closes Sprint 22 sign-off **C3**)
- Extend `LoadStagingRows` + `ApproveBatch` for mount/loadout/magazine/comms — not sensor-only
- `RejectBatch` purges **all** staging tables; no orphan rows (DBI-1.4)
- Sensor commit path regression unchanged (extend-only mandate)
- CmoMarkdown platform import E2E: staged → approved → readback
- No IWriteGate bypass (DBI-8.3 pattern from S22)
- GitNexus impact `CatalogWriteGate --direction upstream` before any edit (CRITICAL)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Partial staging (platform approved, weapon rejected)
- Orphan FK in staged mount row → quarantine, not commit
- Bulk >10 records → `Committed == false` until explicit ApproveBatch (PLE-3.3 / DBI-2.4)
- Concurrent batch reject leaves live tables unchanged (DBI-4.4)

**Filters / commands**:
```powershell
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj --filter "WriteGate|Platform|CmoMarkdown" -v minimal
npx gitnexus impact CatalogWriteGate --direction upstream
```

**Estimated test count**: ~10–14 (per-entity commit paths × 6 types, reject purge, sensor regression, orphan guard, bulk threshold)

*Should-have — defer cleanly to Sprint 24 if S23-01/03 consume buffer; staging-only path from S22 remains valid fallback.*

### S23-05 Phase B schema foundation spike — Config/Data + Integration

**Test file path**: New migration test under `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/` (Platform or Migrations); exporter tests in `PlatformWorkbookRoundTripTests` or dedicated Phase B sheet test

**What to test** (from kickoff AC + GDD 21 Phase B sheets):
- Migration stub applies cleanly on fresh + upgrade DB
- `CatalogSignature` / `CatalogMobility` / `CatalogEmcon` types compile
- Exporter emits empty Phase B sheets (`Signatures`, `Mobility`, `Emcon`) with correct headers per doc 21 workbook layout table
- **Deferred explicitly**: import, validation, sim consumer wiring — tests must NOT assert import behavior
- Tracker row 21 updated in `Game-Requirements/implementation-tracker-2026-06-04.md`

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Export with zero Phase B rows (headers only)
- Schema version in `_Meta` sheet unchanged or bumped per migration convention
- No regression on Phase A sheet export ordering

**Filters / commands**:
```powershell
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj --filter "Platform" -v minimal
```

**Estimated test count**: ~4–6 (migration apply, type compile smoke, 3 sheet header exports, Phase A regression)

*Scope lock: export-stub spike only — full signatures/mobility/EMCON import deferred to Sprint 24 per kickoff risk mitigation.*

### S23-06 CanonicalId determinism on Catalog* types — Logic

**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/WriteGate/CatalogWriteGateTests.cs` or new `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Platform/CanonicalIdDeterminismTests.cs`

**What to test** (from kickoff AC + DBI-7.3):
- Stable `OrderBy` composite keys on mount/loadout/magazine/comms/platform/weapon `Catalog*` types
- Determinism test PASS: same input fixture → identical CanonicalId ordering across runs
- Golden hash pinned for batch proposal + sheet export ordering
- Aliases do not rewrite canonical keys (GDD 21 cross-sheet referential rules)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Empty catalog (zero entities)
- Duplicate alias resolution
- Large batch (100+ rows) — ordering stable, not wall-clock dependent

**Filters / commands**:
```powershell
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj --filter "WriteGate|Platform|Canonical" -v minimal
```

**Estimated test count**: ~3–5 (per-type determinism + golden hash)

*Nice-to-have — depends on S23-04 or parallel; gap noted in S22 qa-plan.*

## Manual QA Checklist

### S23-03 Unity Doctrine Inheritance Panel Editor visual sign-off — UI / Visual / Integration

**Verification method**: Unity Editor PlayMode session + screenshot/video of panel + command dispatch verification; code review + GitNexus impact for ZERO touch.

**Who must sign off**: unity-specialist / c-sharp-engineer / qa-lead (per kickoff DoD and team-unity rules)

**Evidence to capture**: `production/qa/sprint-23-doctrine-editor-signoff-*.md` with:
- Screenshot or video of `DoctrineInheritancePanelHost` in Editor
- WRA/ROE/EMCON fields visible and bound to projection
- Inheritance chain diagram or labeled hierarchy (unit/mission/side)
- PlayMode smoke pass log
- GitNexus/grep confirmation: zero edits to `DelegationBridge.cs`

Checklist:
- [ ] Panel opens in Unity Editor 6.3 LTS without console errors
- [ ] WRA/ROE/EMCON fields visible and bound to `ResolvedUnitPolicy` (GDD 13 P0 UI exposes effective policy)
- [ ] `SetDoctrineOverride` dispatched from panel; headless round-trip still PASS (ADR-010)
- [ ] Inheritance order explainable in UI (GDD 13 AC1, inheritance model)
- [ ] PlayMode smoke PASS (`Doctrine|PlayModeSmoke` filter)
- [ ] ZERO touch to `DelegationBridge` (CRITICAL — kickoff GitNexus Rules)
- [ ] No S1/S2 bugs; no policy bypass (GDD 13 agent integration)
- [ ] FireAbortReason explainability preserved (GDD 13 AC2 regression — headless)

**Headless proxy fallback** (if Unity Editor unavailable locally or in CI):
- Automated headless tests (`DoctrineOverrideCommandTests`, projection/binder tests, PlayMode harness where runnable) constitute **APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS** only
- Production → Polish gate requires manual Editor evidence OR documented waiver with unity-specialist sign-off
- CI path: `dotnet test` filters above; no Unity batchmode required for must-have closeout if manual evidence exists from local Editor run

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off for this sprint (from sprint kickoff Quality Gates + S22 closeout deferrals C2–C4):

```powershell
# Must — full solution (S23-02 establishes baseline; re-run at closeout)
dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln
dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal

# Scoped — per-story verification
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj --filter "Platform|WriteGate|ClosedXml"
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests.csproj --filter "Mcp|Platform"
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj --filter "Doctrine|PlayModeSmoke"
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.Tests.csproj --filter "Doctrine"

# CLI smoke — binary xlsx (S23-01)
dotnet run --project src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli -- platform_export_xlsx --snapshot <id> --output /tmp/test.xlsx
# verify file is ZIP/OLE xlsx, not canonical text

# Unity Editor (S23-03) — local only
# Invoke-C2PlayModeSignoffBatch.ps1 or doctrine-specific PlayMode harness
```

1. Game launches to main menu without crash (Unity smoke if Editor available)
2. New game / new session can be started
3. **S23-01**: CLI `platform_export_xlsx` / `platform_import_xlsx` produce binary `.xlsx` with empty-diff round-trip (PLE-2.1; closes C2)
4. **S23-02**: Full `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln` — 0 failures at closeout
5. **S23-03**: Doctrine panel PlayMode smoke + headless dispatch PASS; manual Editor evidence on file (closes C4)
6. **S23-04** (if delivered): Write-gate `ApproveBatch` commits platform/weapon/mount/loadout/magazine/comms without orphan staging (DBI-1.4; closes C3)
7. Save / load cycle completes without data loss (catalog snapshot binding unchanged)
8. Performance within budget (no new frame spikes from doctrine panel or xlsx I/O)

*Smoke tests verified by developer via `/smoke-check sprint`. Reference this list and scoped filters in kickoff when running that skill. Run before QA hand-off / Production → Polish gate.*

## GitNexus Verification Gates

Mandatory per kickoff GitNexus Rules and AGENTS.md — run **before ANY symbol edit** and document in story PR / evidence:

| Symbol / Area | Risk | Story | Gate |
|---------------|------|-------|------|
| `CatalogWriteGate` | CRITICAL | S23-04 | `npx gitnexus impact CatalogWriteGate --direction upstream` — **extend-only** `LoadStagingRows`/`ApproveBatch`; sensor path regression tests mandatory |
| `IPlatformWorkbookIo` | HIGH | S23-01 | `npx gitnexus impact IPlatformWorkbookIo --direction upstream` before wiring ClosedXML |
| `PlatformWorkbookImporter` | HIGH | S23-01 | Impact upstream before CLI/default I/O switch |
| `PlatformWorkbookExporter` | HIGH | S23-01, S23-05 | Impact upstream before exporter sheet hooks |
| `DelegationBridge` | CRITICAL (ZERO touch) | S23-03 | `npx gitnexus impact DelegationBridge --direction upstream` — no edits; route via command + projection per ADR-010 |
| `DoctrineInheritancePanelHost` | HIGH | S23-03 | Impact before panel changes |
| Repo-wide | — | S23-07, closeout | `npx gitnexus analyze --force` @ `7253381`; `npx gitnexus detect_changes --repo cmano-clone` before each commit |

**Pre-work (day 0)**:
1. `npx gitnexus analyze .` — refresh index @ `7253381`
2. Baseline impacts documented for all CRITICAL/HIGH symbols above
3. `detect_changes` baseline before first story commit

**Post-edit**: `detect_changes` must show expected blast radius only; unexpected `DelegationBridge` or write-gate bypass = **BLOCK**.

*Note: `docs/architecture/control-manifest.md` not found — GitNexus impact + ADR-010/011 govern forbidden patterns.*

---

## Risk / Fallback Matrix

| Risk | QA Mitigation | Fallback |
|------|---------------|----------|
| ClosedXML NuGet restore / CI failure (S23-01) | Verify `dotnet restore` on `ProjectAegis.Data.Excel` in clean env; integration test in CI | Flag keeps `CanonicalTextWorkbookIo` for headless CI; binary `.xlsx` verified locally + manual evidence |
| Full-sln latent failures (S23-02) | Day-1 gate blocks feature work until triaged | Record baseline with known failures + fix plan; do not claim 0 failures until triage complete |
| Unity Editor 6.3 unavailable (S23-03) | Headless proxy tests mandatory PASS | **APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS** — headless only; defer Polish gate until Editor evidence captured |
| `CatalogWriteGate` blast radius (S23-04) | Extend-only + sensor regression suite | Defer S23-04 to Sprint 24; S22 staging-only path remains valid |
| Phase B scope creep (S23-05) | Tests assert export-headers only; no import ACs | Spike complete when migration + empty sheets PASS |
| Must-haves consume buffer | Prioritize S23-01/02/03 closeout gates | S23-04/05/06 defer without blocking sprint sign-off |
| Index stale post-merge | S23-07 + pre-work re-analyze | Block closeout until `analyze --force` @ current HEAD |
